pi_tbnn.note: Realizability penalty either negligible (beta=0.001, matches TBNN) or harmful (beta>=0.01). Tensor basis already produces near-realizable outputs (1.3% violations).

tbrf.note: Offline accuracy ceiling. 3.3GB pickle, 55M node traversals — impractical for online CFD inference.

tbrf_compact.note: Compact variants exported as flat binary (trees.bin) for C++ solver experiments. 10 trees captures 96% of full TBRF accuracy.
